meta.scenario: house +1 move, 6.2 BPM gap, intro exit

transition_arc: T1 is winding down through a sparse, low-energy outro at bar 56 (only hi-hats + filtered pads, kick absent, RMS ~0.15). T2 opens with a clean 8-bar percussion intro (snare sidestick only, no bass). The 16-bar window lets T2's groove build from near-silence while T1 fades — energy briefly dips then T2's full kick arrives just as T1 goes silent. The 6 BPM gap is imperceptible at this energy level.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 0: full groove, kick+bass+pads active, RMS 0.55, section=GROOVE
annotated_actions.why: Start T1 at its first downbeat for clean initial entry.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 56: drums=0.1, harmonic=0.2, rms=0.15 — deep breakdown/outro, kick gone
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: percussion only, bass=0.0, harmonic=0.15
annotated_actions.why: T1 is in its sparsest section — kick has dropped out, only filtered pads remain. Fading here causes no perceptible energy loss. fade_out starts simultaneous with T2 fade_in.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: percussion sidestick present (drums=0.4), bass=0.0, no full groove yet
annotated_actions.why: T2 enters with drums:0.8 (percussion texture only) and other:0.6 (pads/synth). bass:0.0 because T1 bass is still active (will be swapped at midpoint). from_bar=16 skips T2's first 16 bars of near-silence.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 64: bass=0.05 (nearly gone), drums=0.05, rms=0.10 — near-silence
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 24 (fade_in started 8 bars ago): bass about to enter at bar 32
annotated_actions.why: At the midpoint of the 16-bar window, T1 bass is almost inaudible. Swap now to hand off the bassline cleanly before T2's full groove arrives.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 32: full groove active — 4-on-floor kick, bass, pads all present, RMS 0.55
annotated_actions.why: T2 full groove (4-on-floor kick + bass) starts here. The fade_in stem layer is replaced by the full-mix play at T2 bar 32 (first bar of T2's drop section).
